name: Casey Hsu
summary: Full-stack JavaScript developer with 2+ years of professional client work delivering e-commerce storefronts, custom CMS themes, and platform migrations across Shopify, HubSpot, and WordPress. Owns the full project lifecycle as sole developer—scoping, technical planning, deployment, and ongoing maintenance. Contentful Certified Professional. Nine years leading culinary teams of 5–20, managing budgets and vendor relationships, experience now applied to stakeholder communication.

experience.title: Web Developer (Contract)
bullets: Built and maintained a 14+ page Shopify storefront with 200+ product SKUs serving 500+ monthly visitors, migrating from WordPress through three project phases over 2+ years
Designed and shipped an interactive ring builder that lets customers configure stone, band, and size options directly, replacing the legacy manual quote request workflow
Developed custom Liquid templates, integrated Stripe payments, and own all ongoing feature development, bug fixes, and client communication as sole developer

experience.title: Web Developer (Contract)
bullets: Developed a custom 8-page HubSpot theme from scratch with full CRM integration, managing the complete legacy-to-custom migration: content mapping, page restructuring, and reusable HubL module architecture
Cut page load time by 30% and lifted PageSpeed scores above 90 through image optimization, lazy loading, and caching, improving Core Web Vitals and organic search rankings
Configured Google Tag Manager for conversion tracking and analytics; set up GitHub Actions CI pipeline with automated linting before deploying to production

experience.title: Web Developer (Contract)
bullets: Built custom Shopify page layouts and product display modules for a 400+ item vintage gaming catalog, improving collection browsing and product discoverability
Wrote and ran bulk JSON data migrations to restructure the full product catalog, cutting manual data entry time and eliminating duplicate SKU errors
Ran technical SEO audits and security hardening that improved search visibility across target keywords

experience.title: Sous Chef & Team Lead
bullets: Led teams of 5–20 across nine years at multiple Toronto venues: hired and trained staff, managed scheduling, and coordinated operations with ownership and front-of-house
Owned food cost budget and weekly P&L reporting; reduced waste 15% through vendor renegotiation and inventory controls
Hired, trained, and mentored junior cooks; managed vendor relationships and bulk inventory procurement across multiple concurrent supplier accounts

projects.name: Casey's Job Seeker
projects.summary: AI-assisted local job search CLI. Node.js, Ollama, Playwright, SQLite. Discovers, scores, and tailors applications — human approves every submission.
highlights: Built stealth Playwright scraper for LinkedIn guest search with UA spoof, randomized jitter, and 429 backoff — no login or CAPTCHA bypass
Designed Ollama streaming wrapper with 45s stall watchdog, 5-minute hard cap, and automatic retry to handle model instability
Deterministic fit scoring across keyword overlap, stack match, title fit, and ATS density — no LLM in the scoring hot path
Jaccard similarity guardrail rejects any LLM-generated bullet that diverges >40% from source text, enforcing truthfulness at runtime

skills: Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3/Sass, Java, Python
Frameworks: React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, Spring Boot
CMS & Commerce: Shopify (Liquid), HubSpot (HubL), Contentful (Certified Professional), WordPress
AI / LLM: Ollama local inference, prompt engineering, agentic CLI workflows, GPU optimization
Data & Infra: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Docker, AWS, Azure, GitHub Actions CI/CD

education.degree: Contentful Certified Professional + Personalization Skill Badge
